summary: v0.1.0 First Light established Orion's foundation and first successful boot.
v0.2.0 Intelligence Core added Workspace Manager, Code Skill, Session Memory, and Service Registry.
v0.2.1 Project Memory added persistent project context, history, about, and release documentation.
v0.2.2 Open Constellation introduced plugin discovery, lifecycle management, command routing, failure isolation, and the Code Plugin.
v0.2.3 Pathfinder added safe workspace content and file search with regex, path, and file-type filters; removed the accidental nested repository copy.
